name: Iron Dragon Tiamaton
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ティアマトン
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by the following effect. If 3 or more cards are in the same column (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Iron Dragon Tiamaton" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned: Destroy all other cards in this card's column. Neither player can use the unused zones in this card's column.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by the following effect. If 3 or more cards are in the same column (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Iron Dragon Tiamaton" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned: Destroy all other cards in this card's column. Neither player can use the unused zones in this card's column.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Quick, Condition, Trigger, Continuous
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
